gaps.description: find_by_trigger('') produces undefined cosine similarity (zero vector)
gaps.resolution: Guard at function entry: if query is empty or whitespace-only, return [] immediately.

gaps.description: scikit-learn ImportError inside MMD gate crashes pipeline with cryptic error
gaps.resolution: Wrap TF-IDF import in try/except. If unavailable, fall back to existing keyword matcher with a logged warning. The gate degrades to lower precision, not failure.

gaps.description: threshold=0.15 will drift as library grows — IDF weights shift with corpus size
gaps.resolution: Document in module docstring: recalibrate after every 10 new cards by re-running the SEE calibration queries.

gaps.description: NONIDEMPOTENT_RETRY vocabulary gap — misses on 'retry loop' queries
gaps.resolution: Add trigger shape to NONIDEMPOTENT_RETRY card: 'retry loop around an operation that modifies state or has non-idempotent side effects'

edge_cases.expected_behavior: Returns RETRY_AMPLIFICATION and NONIDEMPOTENT_RETRY ranked by score. No false positives.
Falls back to keyword matcher. Warning logged. Pipeline continues.

failure_modes.name: SKLEARN_UNAVAILABLE
failure_modes.message_template: scikit-learn not available — falling back to keyword matching. Install scikit-learn for semantic matching.

integration_points.contract: Calls registry.find_by_trigger(shape) for each code_shape. Expects List[PatternCard] return. Interface unchanged.
